title: autofishhy
body:
## About

**Autofishhy** adds automatic fishing blocks that catch fish and fishing loot for you.

It is made for players who want a simple way to reduce repetitive grinding and make resource gathering more convenient in survival. Set up your fishing blocks, let them work, and spend more time building, exploring, or improving your base.

Autofishhy is a lightweight and practical solution for anyone who wants fishing to be easier, more passive, and more useful.

## IMPORTANT
> Item extraction with hoppers only works with **Autofisher Tier Two**.  
> **Tier One** is too weak to support automatic output.
